title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shadowfax. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
